2604.11374.title: What Do Vision-Language Models Encode for Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment?
2604.11374.paper_summary: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) is an important research problem with practical real-world applications. While methods based on vision-language models (VLMs) are promising candidates for PIAA, it remains unclear whether they internally encode rich, multi-level aesthetic attributes required for effective personalization. In this paper, we first analyze the internal representations of VLMs to examine the presence and distribution of such aesthetic attributes, and then leverage them for lightweight, individual-level personalization without model fine-tuning. Our analysis reveals that VLMs encode diverse aesthetic attributes that propagate into the language decoder layers. Building on these representations, we demonstrate that simple linear models can perform PIAA effectively. We further analyze how aesthetic information is transferred across layers in different VLM architectures and across image domains. Our findings provide insights into how VLMs can be utilized for modeling subjective, individual aesthetic preferences. Our code is available at https://github.com/ynklab/vlm-latent-piaa.
2604.11374.paper_summary_zh: 個性化圖像美學評估（PIAA）是一個重要的研究問題，具有實際的現實應用。雖然基於視覺-語言模型（VLMs）的方法是PIAA的有希望候選者，但目前尚不清楚它們是否內部編碼了有效個性化所需的豐富多層次美學屬性。在本文中，我們首先分析VLMs的內部表示，以檢查這些美學屬性的存在和分佈，然後利用它們進行輕量級的個體級個性化，而無需模型微調。我們的分析顯示，VLMs編碼了多樣的美學屬性，這些屬性會傳播到語言解碼器層。基於這些表示，我們展示了簡單的線性模型可以有效地執行PIAA。我們進一步分析了美學信息如何在不同的VLM架構和圖像領域之間轉移。我們的發現提供了有關如何利用VLMs來建模主觀的個體美學偏好的見解。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/ynklab/vlm-latent-piaa 獲得。
2604.11374.author: Koki Ryu et.al.
